product: TireServ — ERP software for tire & automotive wholesale distributors

claims.claim: 48 years building software exclusively for tire and automotive wholesale distributors
claims.source_url: task spec: Atlas task 7641bdba input_data.content_requests ('48 years in business, purpose-built for tire distribution') + MEGA ads strategy email (max.lester@gomega.ai / Lindsay intake, 2026-07-02, §5 Creative Strategy: 'Authority and longevity — 48 years purpose-built for tire and wholesale distribution')
claims.note: Client-provided/spec-derived authority stat. qbc.com's aging site states 'over 30 years' in older boilerplate; the current, client-confirmed figure per the 2026 strategy intake is 48 years (founded 1978). If the client prefers the conservative site figure, this is a one-word swap — flagged in escalations.
